arts.ttl: Aston Villa team news vs Wolves confirmed as Andres Garcia starts and injury boost revealed
arts.sum: Villa starting XI vs Wolves: Martinez, Garcia, Konsa, Kamara, Digne, Tielemans, Bogarde, McGinn, Rogers, Ramsey, Watkins. From back to front, Emi Martinez starts in goal behind a defence of Garcia, Ezri Konsa, Boubacar Kamara and Lucas Digne.

arts.ttl: When Marcus Rashford could make Aston Villa debut once Man United loan transfer is complete
arts.sum: If Marcus Rashford manages to complete a loan transfer to Aston Villa before Monday night's deadline, the club's supporters would have to wait to see their new star in action. Join our new Aston Villa WhatsApp community

arts.ttl: Aston Villa can build Unai Emery's dream attack with Marcus Rashford bargain
arts.sum: The 22-year-old midfielder has been superb for Villa this season, scoring six goals and providing four assists in 22 Premier League games. Villa's dream frontline once the January transfer window slams shut on Monday evening: Marcus Rashford (Left Wing); Morgan Rogers (Attacking Midfield); Donyell Malen (Right Wing); Ollie Watkins (Striker).

arts.ttl: ‘Arteta is a huge fan’: Arsenal may be more likely to sign £55m attacker than Ollie Watkins - journalist
arts.sum: Arsenal may, once again, have to wait to sign a striker. Indeed, after scouring the market for a new centre-forward all month long, Arsenal have...

arts.ttl: Wolves vs Aston Villa LIVE match updates and team news from Molineux
arts.sum: They drew 1-1 to West Ham in the league last weekend which followed strong results against Everton and Arsenal away from home earlier this month. They are winless in their past six league games following Champions League fixtures, with three home draws and three away defeats.

arts.ttl: Aston Villa close on deal to loan Marcus Rashford from Manchester United
arts.sum: Unai Emery driving more for out-of-favour forward Villa discussing including option to buy Rashford Aston Villa are close to agreeing a deal to sign Marcus Rashford on loan for the rest of the season, with Unai Emery driving the move to sign the out-of-favour Manchester United forward. Villa have been exploring the market in that position after the departure of Jhon Durán, with Matheus Cunha, João Félix, Marco Asensio and Mathys Tel among the options considered. Villa regard Rashford as a low-risk signing given they are unlikely to pay a fee. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: Aston Villa close in on Marcus Rashford loan move
arts.sum: The 27-year-old has been frozen out at Old Trafford under new boss Ruben Amorim.
